sentence: 店门上用金字写着店名。
pinyin: Diàn mén shàng yòng jīnzì xiězhe diànmíng.
english: The shop's name is written in gold lettering above the entrance.

sentence: 这套房子已经有买家了。
pinyin: Zhè tào fángzi yǐjīng yǒu mǎijiā le.
english: This apartment already has a buyer.

meaning: 1. to migrate; 2. to move to a new place of residence
sentence: 她三十岁时移居到了加拿大。
pinyin: Tā sānshí suì shí yíjū dào le Jiānádà.
english: She moved to Canada when she was thirty.

sentence: 部队在山区建立了新的驻地。
pinyin: Bùduì zài shānqū jiànlì le xīn de zhùdì.
english: The troops set up a new station in the mountain area.

meaning: 1. to go on a hunger strike
sentence: 他通过绝食抗议来引起社会关注。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò juéshí kàngyì lái yǐnqǐ shèhuì guānzhù.
english: He went on a hunger strike to draw public attention.
